rationale.R1.5: The agent proposes a coherent end-to-end section plan with clear per-section rationale, including reordering content for better flow and emphasizing key contributions.
rationale.RX.1: Flags specific uncertainties regarding new claims about cost and solver estimators but does not mark confidence for each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: Output stays within the agreed scope without any drift.
rationale.RX.4: No regressions or harmful content introduced; changes are careful and avoid errors.
rationale.RX.5: Major rewrites are traced with explanations, but minor edits lack detailed annotation.
